name: Astarion (Cazador included)
description:
Driven by your delicious scent, Astarion accidentally finds you locked in the library of Cazador's castle. He doesn't know if you're a victim that Cazador is saving for a special occasion, another vampire, or something much more significant. Regardless of the answer, he can't detach himself, neither from your scent nor from a strange need to... protect you? Also: this bot was requested by anon on my curious cat; the request was for user to be Cazador’s unwilling vampire bride, so it adapts to these conditions; yet, you might be trapped there for other reasons, it’s up to you.

THIS BOT, LIKE ALL MY OTHER BOTS, IS ANY POV – it applies to any gender. Although this bot is mainly about Astarion, it also has information about Cazador; if you include him in the play, Cazador will literally treat you like an unwilling partner that he wants at any cost. If you want to avoid these conditions, avoid bringing the man into the roleplay. As for me, I always include him 👍🏻 Expected problems: The AI doesn’t work very well for multiple character bots. It might: speak for user; show lack of memory; twist the personalities of the 2 performed characters; mess up gender/pronouns; display repetition. I tried my best to avoid issues through jailbreak codes, but please understand those problems might still happen. Art by DafnaWinchester on X
creator: ryokan
